[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110 3
1 1111010 5
2 1110000 3
3 1001111 5
4 0100000 1
5 0000010 1
6 1110101 5
7 0001010 2

01 10 1110000 3 match 2
12 21 1000000 1
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0000010 1 match 5
56 65 0001010 2 match 7
67 76 0010010 2
70 07 0010010 2

02 20 1001010 3
13 31 0100000 1 match 4
24 42 0000010 1 match 5
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0000010 1 match 5
57 75 0000110 2
60 06 1111010 5 match 1
71 17 0010000 1

03 30 0100000 1 match 4
14 41 0000000 a
25 52 0001111 4
36 63 0100000 1 match 4
47 74 0000010 1 match 5
50 05 0001010 2 match 7
61 16 1110000 3 match 2
72 27 0000110 2

04 40 0000010 1 match 5
15 51 0000000 a
26 62 1001010 3
37 73 0000000 a
